nodes.label_negative: Exclusion from visual creation without drawing skill

nodes.label: AI as threat to artistic endeavors

nodes.label: Creative productivity and efficiency

nodes.label: Creative expression and quality

nodes.label: Positive appreciation of AI for efficiency
